assertions.assertion: Client has multiple Secret entries in the ClientSecrets collection (both old and new)
assertions.rationale: Lines 25-28 define two Secret entries: new Secret("current-secret".Sha256()) and new Secret("new-secret".Sha256()).

assertions.assertion: Explains that IdentityServer validates against all configured secrets so both old and new work during rollover
assertions.rationale: Line 48 explains 'IdentityServer iterates through all secrets in the ClientSecrets list when validating. If any secret matches, the client is authenticated.'

assertions.assertion: Recommends removing the old secret after clients have migrated to the new one
assertions.rationale: Line 46 states 'Once all clients have been updated, remove the old secret from the configuration.'
